req.title: Search patients
req.statement: A clinician shall search patients by name, MRN, or DOB; only patients in their care shall be returned.
preconditions: role:clinician

doc.reasoning: R-HLT-013 mandates clinician-scoped patient search by name, MRN, or DOB with access control and error handling. Test suite validates: (1) positive case—successful search returning only in-scope patients; (2) negative case—malformed query rejection with 400; (3) boundary case—edge values in DOB and name filters; (4) access control—unauthorized clinician receives empty result; (5) logging—access audit trail recorded. Design applies EP (search parameter types), BVA (date boundaries, name length), NEG (malformed input), and STC (role-based access state).

tests.name: test_search_by_name_returns_in_scope_patients
preconditions: authenticated as clinician with ID: CLIN-001
clinician manages patients: MRN-P001 (name: John Smith), MRN-P002 (name: Jane Smith)
system contains unrelated patient MRN-OTHER (name: John Doe)
access control list configured for CLIN-001
expected: all returned patients have name matching 'Smith'
trace: R-HLT-013: only patients in care returned (access control enforced)
tests.executable:
def test_search_by_name_returns_in_scope_patients():
    auth_token = <get_token_for_clinician('CLIN-001')>
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {auth_token}'}
    resp = requests.get(
        'http://localhost:8080/Patient',
        params={'name': 'Smith'},
        headers=headers
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    bundle = resp.json()
    assert bundle['resourceType'] == 'Bundle'
    assert len(bundle.get('entry', [])) == 2
    mrns = [e['resource']['identifier'][0]['value'] for e in bundle['entry']]
    assert 'MRN-P001' in mrns and 'MRN-P002' in mrns
    assert 'MRN-OTHER' not in mrns

tests.name: test_search_by_mrn_returns_single_patient
preconditions: authenticated as clinician CLIN-002
clinician manages patient with MRN: MRN-UNIQUE-123
patient record exists and is in scope
trace: R-HLT-013: search by MRN parameter supported
tests.executable:
def test_search_by_mrn_returns_single_patient():
    auth_token = <get_token_for_clinician('CLIN-002')>
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {auth_token}'}
    resp = requests.get(
        'http://localhost:8080/Patient',
        params={'identifier': 'MRN-UNIQUE-123'},
        headers=headers
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    bundle = resp.json()
    assert bundle['resourceType'] == 'Bundle'
    assert len(bundle.get('entry', [])) == 1
    mrn = bundle['entry'][0]['resource']['identifier'][0]['value']
    assert mrn == 'MRN-UNIQUE-123'

tests.name: test_search_by_dob_returns_matching_patients
preconditions: authenticated as clinician CLIN-003
clinician manages 3 patients: all with birthDate 1985-06-15
system contains 2 unrelated patients with different birth dates
trace: R-HLT-013: search by DOB parameter supported
R-HLT-013: access control enforced on results

tests.name: test_malformed_query_returns_400
preconditions: authenticated as clinician
API expects valid FHIR query syntax
actions: observe response status and error body
trace: R-HLT-013: error pathway—400 when query malformed
tests.executable:
def test_malformed_query_returns_400():
    auth_token = <get_token_for_clinician('CLIN-001')>
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {auth_token}'}
    resp = requests.get(
        'http://localhost:8080/Patient',
        params={'name': '\\xFF\\xFE'},
        headers=headers
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 400
    outcome = resp.json()
    assert outcome.get('resourceType') == 'OperationOutcome'
    assert len(outcome.get('issue', [])) > 0
    assert outcome['issue'][0]['code'] == 'invalid'

tests.name: test_empty_query_parameter_returns_400
preconditions: authenticated as clinician
at least one search parameter required

tests.name: test_unauthorized_clinician_returns_empty_bundle
preconditions: authenticated as clinician CLIN-UNAUTH
CLIN-UNAUTH has no patients in care
patient MRN-P001 exists but is managed by CLIN-001 only
expected: no patient data leaked to unauthorized clinician
trace: R-HLT-013: access control enforced—only patients in care
R-HLT-013: unauthorized scope returns empty result
tests.executable:
def test_unauthorized_clinician_returns_empty_bundle():
    auth_token = <get_token_for_clinician('CLIN-UNAUTH')>
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {auth_token}'}
    resp = requests.get(
        'http://localhost:8080/Patient',
        params={'name': 'Smith'},
        headers=headers
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    bundle = resp.json()
    assert len(bundle.get('entry', [])) == 0

tests.name: test_search_with_special_characters_in_name
preconditions: authenticated as clinician
patient exists with name containing apostrophe: O'Brien
patient exists with name containing hyphen: Smith-Jones
trace: R-HLT-013: boundary—special characters in name parameter
tests.executable:
def test_search_with_special_characters_in_name():
    auth_token = <get_token_for_clinician('CLIN-001')>
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {auth_token}'}
    resp1 = requests.get(
        'http://localhost:8080/Patient',
        params={'name': "O'Brien"},
        headers=headers
    )
    assert resp1.status_code == 200
    assert len(resp1.json().get('entry', [])) > 0
    resp2 = requests.get(
        'http://localhost:8080/Patient',
        params={'name': 'Smith-Jones'},
        headers=headers
    )
    assert resp2.status_code == 200

tests.name: test_search_dob_boundary_leap_year
preconditions: authenticated as clinician
patient exists with birthDate on leap year: 2000-02-29
system handles leap year dates correctly
expected: response contains patient with exact birthDate 2000-02-29
trace: R-HLT-013: boundary—leap year date handling in DOB search

tests.name: test_search_with_minimum_name_length
preconditions: authenticated as clinician
patient exists with single-character name: 'X'
patient exists with two-character name: 'Al'
expected: first query matches patient 'X' (if configured to)
tests.executable:
def test_search_with_minimum_name_length():
    auth_token = <get_token_for_clinician('CLIN-001')>
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {auth_token}'}
    resp = requests.get(
        'http://localhost:8080/Patient',
        params={'name': 'Al'},
        headers=headers
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    bundle = resp.json()
    assert isinstance(bundle.get('entry'), list)

tests.name: test_search_access_logged_in_audit_trail
preconditions: authenticated as clinician CLIN-AUDIT
audit logging enabled and writable
audit table accessible via <query_audit_log>
actions: query audit log for access record
expected: audit log contains entry for CLIN-AUDIT
log entry includes: timestamp, clinician ID, query params, result count
tests.executable:
def test_search_access_logged_in_audit_trail():
    auth_token = <get_token_for_clinician('CLIN-AUDIT')>
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {auth_token}'}
    resp = requests.get(
        'http://localhost:8080/Patient',
        params={'name': 'Test'},
        headers=headers
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    log_entry = <query_audit_log>(
        clinician='CLIN-AUDIT',
        action='PATIENT_SEARCH',
        limit=1
    )
    assert log_entry is not None
    assert 'name=Test' in str(log_entry.get('query_params', ''))
